name: finance
description: Finance and accounting skills: financial close, journal entry prep, reconciliation, variance analysis, financial statements, and SOX audit workflows.

pax8_mcp_token.title: Pax8 MCP token
pax8_mcp_token.description: MCP token from app.pax8.com -> Integrations -> MCP. Leave blank to disable the Pax8 connector.

pandadoc_api_key.title: PandaDoc API key
pandadoc_api_key.description: API key from app.pandadoc.com -> Settings -> Integrations -> API. Leave blank to disable the PandaDoc connector.
